meaning: Transport and General Workers' Union(英国)运输与普通工人工会
examples: Mr McGuckin said he expects the results of that ballot to reflect the TGWU vote.
Unions involved in the strike include Nipsa, Siptu, TGWU, ATGWU, Amicus and Unison.
Union leaders from the GMB, TGWU and Amicus are examining the new BA proposal, and have yet to comment.
